user.title: Huawei Solar Power Flow
user.description: Configure the source entities from your Huawei Solar integration. The defaults work for standard single-inverter setups.

data_description.inverter_active_power: Total AC bus power. Positive = producing, negative = consuming.
data_description.inverter_input_power: Pure DC solar panel input. Always >= 0.
data_description.power_meter_active_power: Grid meter. Positive = exporting, negative = importing.
data_description.battery_soc: Battery state of charge percentage (for display only).

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Make sure the Huawei Solar integration is running.

abort.already_configured: Huawei Solar Power Flow is already configured.
